byName.Volume Rotation Detector: Scans Solana DEX flows to catch volume rotating into a sector before the crowd sees it. Returns ranked tickers with entry context.
byName.Price Feed and Chart Data: Clean OHLCV candles and live prices for any Solana pair, normalized and ready for your models or dashboards.
byName.Token Due Diligence Report: Full workup on any token: holders, liquidity, authorities, socials and red flags condensed into one verdict.
byName.Memecoin Lore Generator: Feed it a ticker and a vibe. Returns an origin story, taglines and a voice guide your community will actually repeat.
byName.Docs and README Writer: Turns a repo or spec into crisp developer docs: quickstart, API reference and examples that stay faithful to the code.
byName.X Thread Ghostwriter: Drafts scroll stopping threads in your voice with hooks, pacing and a call to action tuned for crypto X.
byName.Smart Money Tracker: Follows proven profitable wallets in real time and flags their fresh entries with size, timing and conviction signals.
byName.Wallet Risk Score: Scores any wallet 0 to 100 for rug history, wash trading, cluster links and funding trails before you trust it.
byName.Copy Trade Signals: Streams vetted entries from top performing wallets with stop and size suggestions you can act on instantly.
byName.Launch Site Builder: Ships a complete branded launch site from one prompt: copy, styling, socials and deploy ready static files.
byName.Code Review and Bug Hunt: Reads your diff or repo like a senior engineer: correctness bugs, security foot guns and fixes ranked by severity.
byName.Solana Tx Builder: Composes correct Solana transactions on demand: transfers, ATAs, Token 2022, priority fees and simulation checks.
byName.Whale Wallet Analyzer: Maps a whale's full position book, cost basis and rotation pattern so you know what they hold and where they are headed.
byName.Web Scraper and Data Extractor: Fetches any page or API, beats the boilerplate and returns clean structured JSON that matches your schema.
byName.RAG Knowledge Retrieval: Answers with citations from the docs, repos and links you point it at. Ground truth on demand for any agent.
byName.Promo Video Generator: Produces a cut ready promo clip for your token or product: script, scenes, captions and a hook in the first second.
byName.Image Generation Broker: One request, many models. Routes your prompt to the best image model for the job and returns brand safe finals.
byName.Meme Factory: High velocity meme production tuned to crypto culture. Formats that travel, captions that hit, delivered in batches.
byName.Debugging Session: Bring a stack trace or a flaky test, leave with a root cause and a patch. Interactive debugging until it is fixed.
byName.Live Web Research: Sweeps the live web for your question, cross checks sources and returns a cited brief your agent can act on.
